# Hummingbird capability coverage

> Source: `docs/hummingbird/capability-ledger.v1.yaml`
> Ledger date: 2026-07-20
> **Counts are inventory controls, not a functional-parity percentage.** A capability is complete only when its evidence satisfies the dated execution plan.

## Inventory summary

- Capabilities: 51
- Navigation routes with a single ledger owner: 100
- Staff mobile/auth operations with a single ledger owner: 58
- Patient API operations with a single ledger owner: 25
- Implementation states: `not_applicable` 11, `partial` 22, `planned` 18
- Target dispositions: `DEEPLINK` 8, `DESKTOP_ONLY` 9, `GLANCE` 10, `NATIVE` 20, `NOTIFY` 3, `PATIENT` 1
